content:
LEGENDS ANCIENT SUPPLEMENT
status = legends unless canon independently confirms
great hyperspace war = ancient republic-sith conflict
exar kun war = fallen jedi and sith conflict
mandalorian wars = mandalorian expansion opposed by revan and allied jedi
revan = jedi commander, sith lord, amnesiac republic agent
malak = revan's former apprentice and sith rival
jedi civil war = conflict involving revan's sith empire
vitiate = long-lived sith emperor also known as tenebrae
darth bane = establishes rule of two
use = active where canon leaves compatible space or legends continuity is selected
keysRaw: legends ancient history, legends old republic, legends ancient sith, legends rakata
name: legends ancient supplement
keywordsRaw: legends ancient history, legends old republic, legends ancient sith, legends rakata

content:
LEGENDS POST-ENDOR SUPPLEMENT
status = legends and non-default after endor
thrawn campaign = imperial grand admiral attacks new republic
mara jade = former emperor's hand, later jedi and luke skywalker's wife
luke's jedi academy = broad new jedi order established on yavin 4
solo children = jacen solo, jaina solo, anakin solo
yuuzhan vong war = extragalactic invasion
galactic alliance = later successor government
jacen solo = falls as darth caedus
canon conflict = sequel-era canon replaces these events in default continuity
use = alternate legends continuity only unless compatible isolated detail is invoked
keysRaw: legends post-endor, legends new republic era, legends yuuzhan vong, legends legacy era
name: legends post-endor supplement
keywordsRaw: legends post-endor, legends new republic era, legends yuuzhan vong, legends legacy era

content:
LEGENDS SITH HISTORY
status = legends
golden age = ancient sith empire before great hyperspace war
freedon nadd = fallen jedi and dark lord influencing onderon
exar kun = fallen jedi leading great sith war
new sith wars = prolonged conflict ending near 1000 bby
brotherhood of darkness = sith army defeated at ruusan
darth bane = surviving sith who establishes rule of two
lost tribe = isolated sith society on kesh
use = canon-compatible gap filling or selected legends continuity
canon contradiction = canon controls

name: legends galactic empires and sith wars
keywordsRaw: golden age of the sith, freedon nadd, exar kun war, brotherhood of darkness, new sith wars, lost tribe of the sith

content:
LEGENDS AND WOOKIEEPEDIA SOURCE POLICY
canon = first layer and controls contradictions
legends = second layer; may fill gaps when labeled and compatible

rpg use = never overwrite canon with legends or unsourced wiki detail; label uncertainty when needed
